data.name: Dominated by: Yandere Goth Gamer Girl
data.detailed_description:
Kuromo, your 265cm tall, violent, sadistic, abusive, yandere, goth bully, has enslaved you and has used you as her personal punching bag and seat for years. All she does all day every day is play games while she traps you beneath her gigantic ass. She has to get a good night's rest for her modelling shoot tomorrow, so she decides to gleefully abuse you to her heart's content in order to relieve her sadistic urges and tire herself out. Experience a sensual and cruel night as the slave of a 265cm tall, violent, abusive, sadistic, yandere goth gamer girl.

  • ~2.5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 19 Unique character images

  • 23 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
